system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'
user:
CUSTOMER LANGUAGE: en
CUSTOMER EMAIL: orders@finolab-electronics.de
ORIGINAL SUBJECT: WO update — add 2 more assets to the open cal job
DETECTED INTENT: wo_update_request
ACTION: update_work_order
EXECUTION RESULT: {'status': 'awaiting_one_click', 'action': 'update_work_order', 'preview': {'action': 'update_work_order', 'customer_id': 10, 'extracted': {'work_order_number': None, 'order_number': None, 'requested_action': 'Add 2 assets to the open calibration work order and coordinate a single on-site technician visit', 'add_assets': ['N9020B MXA Signal Analyzer · S/N KS-MXA-441298 · normal cal interval', 'DSOX3024T Oscilloscope · S/N KS-DSOX-882011 · normal cal interval'], 'add_note': 'Customer requests adding two returned-from-field assets to the existing open calibration WO so they are calibrated during the same on-site technician visit; should be covered under active service contract.', 'add_task': 'Coordinate schedule to calibrate all assets in one technician visit', '_intent': 'wo_update_request'}}}
EXTRACTED FIELDS: {'work_order_number': None, 'order_number': None, 'requested_action': 'Add 2 assets to the open calibration work order and coordinate a single on-site technician visit', 'add_assets': ['N9020B MXA Signal Analyzer · S/N KS-MXA-441298 · normal cal interval', 'DSOX3024T Oscilloscope · S/N KS-DSOX-882011 · normal cal interval'], 'add_note': 'Customer requests adding two returned-from-field assets to the existing open calibration WO so they are calibrated during the same on-site technician visit; should be covered under active service contract.', 'add_task': 'Coordinate schedule to calibrate all assets in one technician visit', '_intent': 'wo_update_request'}

Draft a courteous, accurate reply. JSON only.

Respond with a single JSON object only. No code fences. No prose before or after.
raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: WO update — add 2 more assets to the open cal job", "body": "Dear Finolab Electronics Team,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your open calibration work order.

We have received your request to add the following two assets to the existing open calibration work order so they can be calibrated during the same on-site technician visit:

  1. N9020B MXA Signal Analyzer — S/N KS-MXA-441298 (normal cal interval)
  2. DSOX3024T Oscilloscope — S/N KS-DSOX-882011 (normal cal interval)

We have also noted your request to coordinate the schedule so that all assets are calibrated in a single technician visit, and that this work should be covered under your active service contract.

Your update request has been logged and is pending internal confirmation. Once approved, our scheduling team will update the work order accordingly and coordinate the consolidated on-site visit. We will follow up with confirmation and any updated scheduling details shortly.

If you have any additional assets or special access requirements for the site visit, please let us know at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team"}

parsed.subject: Re: WO update — add 2 more assets to the open cal job
parsed.body:
Dear Finolab Electronics Team,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your open calibration work order.

We have received your request to add the following two assets to the existing open calibration work order so they can be calibrated during the same on-site technician visit:

  1. N9020B MXA Signal Analyzer — S/N KS-MXA-441298 (normal cal interval)
  2. DSOX3024T Oscilloscope — S/N KS-DSOX-882011 (normal cal interval)

We have also noted your request to coordinate the schedule so that all assets are calibrated in a single technician visit, and that this work should be covered under your active service contract.

Your update request has been logged and is pending internal confirmation. Once approved, our scheduling team will update the work order accordingly and coordinate the consolidated on-site visit. We will follow up with confirmation and any updated scheduling details shortly.

If you have any additional assets or special access requirements for the site visit, please let us know at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team
